SOURCE: 30563572.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (30563572.pdf)
SUMMARY: A Human Resources Business Partner with extensive experience aligning HR strategy with business strategy for assigned business groups.
SKILLS: Change Management, coaching, client, detail oriented, direction, Employee Relations, Finance, hiring, HRIS, HR, human resources, insurance, Leadership, Legal, Marketing, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint, MS Word, Oracle, organizational, PeopleSoft, performance management, recruiting, recruitment, reporting, Self-motivated, Staffing, strategy, vendor relations, Verbal Communication Skills, Excellent Written

SOURCE: 30563572.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Manager/Business Partner
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 2000 to January 2014
DESCRIPTION: ['Point of contact for multiple business groups of 400+ employees.', 'Strategic Business Partner: Worked with Vice Presidents, Directors, and other management on workforce planning, talent management, change management, and building organizational capability.', 'Employee Relations: Resolved employee relations issues, partnered with legal counsel as needed.', 'Talent Management: Provided coaching and feedback to managers and employees, facilitated annual calibration, salary planning, and talent reviews.', 'Workforce Planning: Partnered with Talent Acquisition on recruitment strategies, identified skill gaps, analyzed trends, implemented retention initiatives.', 'Designed and executed HR plans within assigned business groups.']

SOURCE: 30563572.pdf
JOB TITLE: Senior Human Resources Generalist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 1997 to January 2000
DESCRIPTION: ['Point of contact for client group of 400+ employees in a fast-paced manufacturing environment.', 'Strategic business partner with Vice President, Directors, and other management.', 'Managed employee relations issues, talent acquisition, benefits administration, and worker compensation claims.']

SOURCE: 30563572.pdf
JOB TITLE: Associate Human Resources Representative
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 1992 to January 1997
DESCRIPTION: ['Administered company benefit programs for 800 employees.', 'Conducted new hire orientation and managed employee events.']

SOURCE: 30563572.pdf
DEGREE: B.S. Business Administration
INSTITUTION: California State University, City
